children.heading: Procedures
children.label: B Procedures
children.text: The Secretary shall, to the maximum extent practicable, publish streamlined and expedited procedures not later than 5 days after , for passenger air carriers and contractors to submit requests for financial assistance under this part.December 27, 2020

children.heading: Deadline for immediate payroll assistance
children.label: 2 Deadline for immediate payroll assistance
children.text: Not later than 10 days after , the Secretary shall make initial payments to passenger air carriers and contractors that submit requests for financial assistance approved by the Secretary.December 27, 2020

children.heading: Subsequent payments
children.label: 3 Subsequent payments
children.text: The Secretary shall determine an appropriate method for the timely distribution of payments to passenger air carriers and contractors with approved requests for financial assistance from any funds remaining available after providing initial financial assistance payments under paragraph (2).

children.heading: Pro rata reductions
children.label: c Pro rata reductions
children.text: The Secretary shall have the authority to reduce, on a pro rata basis, the amounts due to passenger air carriers and contractors under subsection (a) in order to address any shortfall in assistance that would otherwise be provided under such subsection.

children.heading: Audits
children.label: d Audits
children.text: The Inspector General of the Department of the Treasury shall audit certifications made under subsection (a).
